arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSV simulated to predict the Gunners' Champions League Round of 16 fate
arts.sum: Arsenal will be looking to confirm their place in the Champions League quarter-finals when they take on PSV in their Round of 16 second-leg clash later tonight. Real Madrid beat Atletico Madrid 4-2 on aggregate in the other Round of 16, clash setting up a meeting between Arsenal and the competition holders in the Champions League quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: ‘Fits the bill’ – Arsenal zoom in on signing, Mikel Arteta key as bargain available
arts.sum: As ever, and perhaps more than usual, there are many players who have contracts expiring at the end of June who don’t look close to agreeing renewals. That means they can talk to other clubs right now, and potentially then leave on a free transfer come the summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSV Eindhoven – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal are virtually through to the quarter-finals of the Champions League at the expense of PSV Eindhoven before the second leg has even gotten underway. The Gunners ran riot last Wednesday as they put seven past their Dutch counterparts in a ruthless display. arts.ttl: Arsenal target €80m deal as 'DREAM' transfer revealed
arts.sum: FootballTransfers exclusively revealed that Newcastle United are eager to sign Ektike as a replacement for Alexander Isak, if the Sweden international leaves the club this summer, while Arsenal are now eyeing a possible deal. That is according to Sky Sport, who claim that Eintracht Frankfurt will demand a transfer fee of at least €80 million to allow Ekitike to leave the club following the conclusion of the 2024-25 campaign.
